title: SkullToHead
description: Turn skulls into player heads with any skin using books!
body:
## About
This is a small data pack for 1.15-1.19+ that allows you to turn skulls into player heads with skin of any player even in survival, and also change already changed player heads.
## How do I do this?
1. Get a book and quill
2. Sign it with a nickname of the player you want to get skin from
3. Throw the book and a skeleton skull in the same place
4. **Magic!**

You can also change the player head if you made a mistake or just want to change the head, just instead of the skeleton skull throw the written book at the player head.
## Note
You can make it, so even a regular player head with no skin applied will also change the skin like a skull, just go to the file `head_to_head.mcfunction`  and in the last command delete `,tag:{}` part of the command, save the changes and type /reload in your minecraft world.
